modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Monitor is not turning on at all.

full_description_text: The monitor isn't working. I tried to turn it on but nothing happens. It's just dead, no lights or anything.
short_description: Monitor is not turning on at all.
description: The monitor isn't working. I tried to turn it on but nothing happens. It's just dead, no lights or anything.
